best_match.name: Two Block
best_match.reason: Enhances the round shape and provides a trendy yet adaptable look.

good_options.name: Comma Hair
good_options.reason: Stylish and suitable for a round face, allowing for a youthful appearance.

good_options.name: Shaggy Cut (male)
good_options.reason: Casual and easygoing, complements straight hair texture.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: Classic and sophisticated, accentuates face shape well.

not_recommended.name: Mohawk
not_recommended.reason: Does not harmonize with face shape and hair texture.

not_recommended.name: Bowl Cut
not_recommended.reason: Enhances roundness, may not flatter the face shape.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: Unsuited for straight texture and may overwhelm face.

analysis.parting_recommendation: Side part adds interesting dimension to a round face.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Curtain bangs can provide a framing effect.

length_options.medium_verdict: Offers versatility while complementing natural hair texture.

avoid.name: Warm Red
avoid.reason: Conflicts with personal Winter color palette.

avoid.name: Golden Blonde
avoid.reason: Too warm for natural skin tone.

analysis.summary: A Two Block hairstyle suits the natural hair texture and face shape well, providing a modern and versatile look. Cool-toned hair colors like Jet Black work best with this individual's Winter palette.
care_tips: Use a gentle, sulfate-free shampoo to maintain natural oils.
Regular trims will help maintain the shape and manage density.
Moisturizing conditioner helps keep hair looking shiny and healthy.
